chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No. D-1174 of 2023 (Gul Hassan Boohar Vs. Province of Sindh & others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For Orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 11-01-2024. Mr. Khadim Hussain Malik, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ghulam Mustafa Abro, Assistant A.G, Sindh. ******** 1. Over ruled. 2. The petitioner by way of instant petition has sought for direction against the respondents to release the pensionary benefits of his father. As per comments furnished by Divisional Forest Officer Afforstation Division, Sukkur the pensionary benefits of the father of the petitioner have already been released in favour of his wife, which have not been rebutted by the petitioner by filing any counter affidavit. The pensionary benefits of an employee which have already been released could not be ordered to be released again by this Court by way of instant petition; same being misconceived is dismissed accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI
